---
title: "Untitled"
author: "miryala vaishnavi"
date: "2026-04-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r}


library(dplyr)
library(psych)

# ============================================================
 DATA LOADING
# ============================================================

base <- getwd()

# ---------------- SINGLE PHONE RT ----------------
path_sp  <- file.path(base, "data_brsm", "single", "phone")
files_sp <- sort(list.files(path_sp, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE))

single_phone_rt <- numeric(length(files_sp))
single_phone_lw <- matrix(
  NA_real_,
  nrow = length(files_sp),
  ncol = 15
)

for (i in seq_along(files_sp)) {

  df <- read.csv(files_sp[i])

  if (startsWith(basename(files_sp[i]), "6"))
    df <- df[df$PlayerID != "Player_2", ]

  df <- df[df$Completed == "true" &
             df$InitialResponseTime.ms. > 0, ]

  for (lv in 1:15) {

    v <- df$InitialResponseTime.ms.[df$Level == lv]

    if (length(v) > 0)
      single_phone_lw[i, lv] <- mean(v)
  }

  single_phone_rt[i] <- mean(df$InitialResponseTime.ms.)
}

# ---------------- MULTI PHONE RT ----------------
path_mp  <- file.path(base, "data_brsm", "multiple", "phone")
files_mp <- sort(list.files(path_mp, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE))

multi_phone_rt <- numeric(length(files_mp))
multi_phone_lw <- matrix(
  NA_real_,
  nrow = length(files_mp),
  ncol = 10
)

for (i in seq_along(files_mp)) {

  df <- read.csv(files_mp[i])

  df <- df[df$Completed == "true" &
             df$InitialResponseTime.ms. > 0 &
             df$Level %in% 1:10, ]

  for (lv in 1:10) {

    v <- df$InitialResponseTime.ms.[df$Level == lv]

    if (length(v) > 0)
      multi_phone_lw[i, lv] <- mean(v)
  }

  multi_phone_rt[i] <- if (nrow(df) > 0)
    mean(df$InitialResponseTime.ms.)
  else
    NA_real_
}

# ---------------- SINGLE LAB RT ----------------
path_sl  <- file.path(base, "data_brsm", "single", "lab")
files_sl <- sort(list.files(path_sl, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE))

single_lab_rt <- numeric(length(files_sl))
single_lab_lw <- NULL

for (i in seq_along(files_sl)) {

  df <- read.csv(files_sl[i])

  rt <- df$mouse.time[!is.na(df$mouse.time)]

  rt <- suppressWarnings(
    as.numeric(gsub("\\[|\\]", "", rt))
  )

  rt <- rt[!is.na(rt)]

  single_lab_lw <- rbind(single_lab_lw, rt)

  single_lab_rt[i] <- mean(rt)
}

single_lab_rt_ms <- single_lab_rt * 1000
single_lab_lw_ms <- single_lab_lw * 1000

# ---------------- MULTI LAB RT ----------------
path_ml  <- file.path(base, "data_brsm", "multiple", "lab")
files_ml <- sort(list.files(path_ml, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE))

multi_lab_rt <- numeric(length(files_ml))
multi_lab_lw <- NULL

for (i in seq_along(files_ml)) {

  df <- read.csv(files_ml[i], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  vals <- c()

  for (entry in df$mouse.time[!is.na(df$mouse.time)]) {

    parts <- strsplit(
      gsub("\\]\\[", "]|||[", entry),
      "\\|\\|\\|"
    )[[1]]

    for (p in parts) {

      cl <- gsub("\\[|\\]", "", p)

      if (nchar(trimws(cl)) > 0) {

        parsed <- suppressWarnings(
          as.numeric(strsplit(cl, ",")[[1]])
        )

        parsed <- parsed[!is.na(parsed)]

        if (length(parsed) > 0)
          vals <- c(vals, tail(parsed, 1) / length(parsed))
      }
    }
  }

  multi_lab_lw <- rbind(multi_lab_lw, vals)

  multi_lab_rt[i] <- mean(vals)
}

multi_lab_rt_ms <- multi_lab_rt * 1000

multi_lab_lw_10_ms <- multi_lab_lw[
  ,
  1:min(10, ncol(multi_lab_lw)),
  drop = FALSE
] * 1000

# ---------------- SANITY CHECK ----------------
cat("=== SAMPLE SIZES ===\n")

cat("Single Phone: n =", sum(!is.na(single_phone_rt)), "\n")
cat("Multi  Phone: n =", sum(!is.na(multi_phone_rt)), "\n")
cat("Single Lab:   n =", length(single_lab_rt_ms), "\n")
cat("Multi  Lab:   n =", length(multi_lab_rt_ms), "\n\n")

# ============================================================
# HELPER FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================

mw_effect_r <- function(W, n1, n2) {

  U <- min(W, n1 * n2 - W)

  mu_U <- n1 * n2 / 2

  sig_U <- sqrt(
    n1 * n2 * (n1 + n2 + 1) / 12
  )

  Z <- (U - mu_U) / sig_U

  round(abs(Z) / sqrt(n1 + n2), 3)
}

wsr_effect_r <- function(V, n) {

  mu_V <- n * (n + 1) / 4

  sig_V <- sqrt(
    n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) / 24
  )

  Z <- (V - mu_V) / sig_V

  round(abs(Z) / sqrt(n), 3)
}

alpha_grade <- function(a) {

  ifelse(
    a >= 0.9, "Excellent",
    ifelse(
      a >= 0.8, "Good",
      ifelse(
        a >= 0.7, "Acceptable",
        ifelse(
          a >= 0.6,
          "Questionable",
          "Poor"
        )
      )
    )
  )
}

# ============================================================
# SECTION 1: BETWEEN-SUBJECTS RT COMPARISON
# ============================================================

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("SECTION 1: BETWEEN-SUBJECTS RT COMPARISON\n")
cat("Single Target (n=21) vs Multiple Target (n=16)\n")
cat("=======================================================\n\n")

# ---------- 1A. GAME RT ----------
cat("--- 1A. GAME RT: Single vs Multiple ---\n")

cat("H0: RT distribution is the same in both conditions\n")

cat("H1: RT distributions differ between conditions\n\n")

n1_sp <- sum(!is.na(single_phone_rt))
n2_mp <- sum(!is.na(multi_phone_rt))

mw1a <- wilcox.test(
  single_phone_rt,
  multi_phone_rt,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(mw1a)

cat(sprintf(
  "Effect size r = %.3f\n",
  mw_effect_r(mw1a$statistic, n1_sp, n2_mp)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Single Game: M = %.2f ms, SD = %.2f ms\n",
  mean(single_phone_rt, na.rm = TRUE),
  sd(single_phone_rt, na.rm = TRUE)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Multi  Game: M = %.2f ms, SD = %.2f ms\n\n",
  mean(multi_phone_rt, na.rm = TRUE),
  sd(multi_phone_rt, na.rm = TRUE)
))

# ---------- 1B. LAB RT ----------
cat("--- 1B. LAB RT: Single vs Multiple ---\n")

cat("H0: RT distribution is the same in both conditions\n")

cat("H1: RT distributions differ between conditions\n\n")

n1_sl <- length(single_lab_rt_ms)
n2_ml <- length(multi_lab_rt_ms)

mw1b <- wilcox.test(
  single_lab_rt_ms,
  multi_lab_rt_ms,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(mw1b)

cat(sprintf(
  "Effect size r = %.3f\n",
  mw_effect_r(mw1b$statistic, n1_sl, n2_ml)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Single Lab: M = %.2f ms, SD = %.2f ms\n",
  mean(single_lab_rt_ms),
  sd(single_lab_rt_ms)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Multi  Lab: M = %.2f ms, SD = %.2f ms\n\n",
  mean(multi_lab_rt_ms),
  sd(multi_lab_rt_ms)
))

# ============================================================
# SECTION 2: WITHIN-SUBJECTS RT COMPARISON
# ============================================================

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("SECTION 2: WITHIN-SUBJECTS RT COMPARISON\n")
cat("Game vs Lab (same participants — paired test)\n")
cat("Test: Wilcoxon Signed-Rank\n")
cat("=======================================================\n\n")

# ---------- 2A. SINGLE TARGET ----------
cat("--- 2A. SINGLE TARGET: Game vs Lab ---\n")

cat("H0: No difference between Game RT and Lab RT (Single Target)\n")

cat("H1: Game RT and Lab RT are significantly different\n\n")

valid_idx <- which(
  !is.na(single_phone_rt) &
    !is.na(single_lab_rt_ms)
)

wcx2a <- wilcox.test(
  single_phone_rt[valid_idx],
  single_lab_rt_ms[valid_idx],
  paired = TRUE,
  exact = FALSE
)

print(wcx2a)

cat(sprintf(
  "Effect size r = %.3f\n",
  wsr_effect_r(wcx2a$statistic, length(valid_idx))
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Game: M = %.2f ms | Lab: M = %.2f ms\n",
  mean(single_phone_rt, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(single_lab_rt_ms)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Median difference (Game - Lab) = %.2f ms\n\n",
  median(
    single_phone_rt - single_lab_rt_ms,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
))

# ---------- 2B. MULTIPLE TARGET ----------
cat("--- 2B. MULTIPLE TARGET: Game vs Lab ---\n")

cat("H0: No difference between Game RT and Lab RT (Multiple Target)\n")

cat("H1: Game RT and Lab RT are significantly different\n\n")

valid_m <- which(!is.na(multi_phone_rt))

mp_clean <- multi_phone_rt[valid_m]
ml_clean <- multi_lab_rt_ms[valid_m]

if (length(mp_clean) != length(ml_clean)) {

  stop(
    "Length mismatch after NA removal: multi phone vs multi lab."
  )
}

wcx2b <- wilcox.test(
  mp_clean,
  ml_clean,
  paired = TRUE,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(wcx2b)

cat(sprintf(
  "Effect size r = %.3f\n",
  wsr_effect_r(wcx2b$statistic, length(mp_clean))
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Game: M = %.2f ms | Lab: M = %.2f ms\n",
  mean(mp_clean),
  mean(ml_clean)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Median difference (Game - Lab) = %.2f ms\n\n",
  median(mp_clean - ml_clean)
))

# ============================================================
# SECTION 3: TASK ORDER EFFECT
# ============================================================

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("SECTION 3: TASK ORDER EFFECT\n")
cat("=======================================================\n\n")

cat("Ordering (from correlations.R observations):\n")

cat("  Single — odd  positions (1,3,5,...): Phone first\n")

cat("         — even positions (2,4,6,...): Lab   first\n")

cat("  Multi  — odd  positions (1,3,5,...): Lab   first\n")

cat("         — even positions (2,4,6,...): Phone first\n\n")

n_sp <- length(single_phone_rt)
n_sl <- length(single_lab_rt_ms)

sg_phonefirst <- single_phone_rt[seq(1, n_sp, 2)]
sg_labfirst   <- single_phone_rt[seq(2, n_sp, 2)]

sl_phonefirst <- single_lab_rt_ms[seq(1, n_sl, 2)]
sl_labfirst   <- single_lab_rt_ms[seq(2, n_sl, 2)]

n_mp <- length(multi_phone_rt)
n_ml <- length(multi_lab_rt_ms)

mg_labfirst   <- multi_phone_rt[seq(1, n_mp, 2)]
mg_phonefirst <- multi_phone_rt[seq(2, n_mp, 2)]

ml_labfirst   <- multi_lab_rt_ms[seq(1, n_ml, 2)]
ml_phonefirst <- multi_lab_rt_ms[seq(2, n_ml, 2)]

cat("--- SINGLE GROUP descriptives ---\n")

cat(sprintf(
  "Phone-first (n=%d): Game M=%.0f ms | Lab M=%.0f ms\n",
  length(sg_phonefirst),
  mean(sg_phonefirst, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(sl_phonefirst, na.rm = TRUE)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Lab-first   (n=%d): Game M=%.0f ms | Lab M=%.0f ms\n\n",
  length(sg_labfirst),
  mean(sg_labfirst, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(sl_labfirst, na.rm = TRUE)
))

cat("--- MULTI GROUP descriptives ---\n")

cat(sprintf(
  "Lab-first   (n=%d): Game M=%.0f ms | Lab M=%.0f ms\n",
  length(mg_labfirst),
  mean(mg_labfirst, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(ml_labfirst, na.rm = TRUE)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "Phone-first (n=%d): Game M=%.0f ms | Lab M=%.0f ms\n\n",
  length(mg_phonefirst),
  mean(mg_phonefirst, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(ml_phonefirst, na.rm = TRUE)
))

# ---------- 3A. Single GAME RT ----------
cat("--- 3A. Single GAME RT: Phone-first vs Lab-first ---\n")

cat("H0: Task order has no effect on Game RT (Single group)\n")

cat("H1: Task order affects Game RT\n\n")

mw3a <- wilcox.test(
  sg_phonefirst,
  sg_labfirst,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(mw3a)

cat(sprintf(
  "Effect size r = %.3f\n\n",
  mw_effect_r(
    mw3a$statistic,
    length(na.omit(sg_phonefirst)),
    length(na.omit(sg_labfirst))
  )
))

# ---------- 3B. Single LAB RT ----------
cat("--- 3B. Single LAB RT: Phone-first vs Lab-first ---\n")

cat("H0: Task order has no effect on Lab RT (Single group)\n")

cat("H1: Task order affects Lab RT\n\n")

mw3b <- wilcox.test(
  sl_phonefirst,
  sl_labfirst,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(mw3b)

cat(sprintf(
  "Effect size r = %.3f\n\n",
  mw_effect_r(
    mw3b$statistic,
    length(na.omit(sl_phonefirst)),
    length(na.omit(sl_labfirst))
  )
))

# ---------- 3C. Multi GAME RT ----------
cat("--- 3C. Multi GAME RT: Lab-first vs Phone-first ---\n")

cat("H0: Task order has no effect on Game RT (Multi group)\n")

cat("H1: Task order affects Game RT\n\n")

mw3c <- wilcox.test(
  mg_labfirst,
  mg_phonefirst,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(mw3c)

cat(sprintf(
  "Effect size r = %.3f\n\n",
  mw_effect_r(
    mw3c$statistic,
    length(na.omit(mg_labfirst)),
    length(na.omit(mg_phonefirst))
  )
))

# ---------- 3D. Multi LAB RT ----------
cat("--- 3D. Multi LAB RT: Lab-first vs Phone-first ---\n")

cat("H0: Task order has no effect on Lab RT (Multi group)\n")

cat("H1: Task order affects Lab RT\n\n")

mw3d <- wilcox.test(
  ml_labfirst,
  ml_phonefirst,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

print(mw3d)

cat(sprintf(
  "Effect size r = %.3f\n\n",
  mw_effect_r(
    mw3d$statistic,
    length(na.omit(ml_labfirst)),
    length(na.omit(ml_phonefirst))
  )
))

# ============================================================
# SECTION 4: RELIABILITY — CRONBACH'S ALPHA
# ============================================================

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("SECTION 4: RELIABILITY — CRONBACH'S ALPHA\n")
cat("=======================================================\n\n")

cat("Threshold: α ≥ 0.9 Excellent | ≥ 0.8 Good |\n")

cat("           ≥ 0.7 Acceptable  | ≥ 0.6 Questionable | < 0.6 Poor\n\n")

compute_alpha <- function(
  lw_matrix,
  label,
  max_cols = NULL
) {

  cat("---", label, "---\n")

  df <- as.data.frame(lw_matrix)

  if (!is.null(max_cols))
    df <- df[
      ,
      seq_len(min(max_cols, ncol(df))),
      drop = FALSE
    ]

  colnames(df) <- paste0(
    "Level_",
    seq_len(ncol(df))
  )

  valid_cols <- colSums(!is.na(df)) > 1

  df <- df[
    ,
    valid_cols,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  if (ncol(df) < 2) {

    cat(
      "  Cannot compute: fewer than 2 valid levels remaining.\n\n"
    )

    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  result <- psych::alpha(
    df,
    na.rm = TRUE,
    check.keys = TRUE,
    warnings = FALSE
  )

  tot <- result$total

  cat(sprintf(
    "  Cronbach's α     = %.4f  [%s]\n",
    tot$raw_alpha,
    alpha_grade(tot$raw_alpha)
  ))

  cat(sprintf(
    "  Standardized α   = %.4f\n",
    tot$std.alpha
  ))

  cat(sprintf(
    "  Avg inter-item r = %.4f\n",
    tot$average_r
  ))

  cat(sprintf(
    "  Levels included  = %d\n\n",
    ncol(df)
  ))

  invisible(result)
}

a_sg <- compute_alpha(
  single_phone_lw,
  "Single Target — GAME  (Levels 1–15)",
  15
)

a_mg <- compute_alpha(
  multi_phone_lw,
  "Multi  Target — GAME  (Levels 1–10)",
  10
)

a_sl <- compute_alpha(
  single_lab_lw_ms,
  "Single Target — LAB   (Trials 1–15)",
  15
)

a_ml <- compute_alpha(
  multi_lab_lw_10_ms,
  "Multi  Target — LAB   (Trials 1–10)",
  10
)

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("RELIABILITY SUMMARY\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")

get_alpha <- function(x)
  if (is.null(x)) NA else round(x$total$raw_alpha, 4)

alpha_vals <- c(
  get_alpha(a_sg),
  get_alpha(a_mg),
  get_alpha(a_sl),
  get_alpha(a_ml)
)

summary_df <- data.frame(
  Condition = c(
    "Single Game",
    "Multi Game",
    "Single Lab",
    "Multi Lab"
  ),
  Alpha = alpha_vals,
  Grade = alpha_grade(alpha_vals),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(summary_df, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n")

# ============================================================
# SECTION 5: RESULTS SUMMARY
# ============================================================

cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("RESULTS SUMMARY\n")
cat("=======================================================\n\n")

cat("BETWEEN-SUBJECTS (Single vs Multi):\n")

cat(sprintf(
  "  Game: W = %.0f, p = %s\n",
  mw1a$statistic,
  format(mw1a$p.value, digits = 4)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "  Lab:  W = %.0f, p = %s\n\n",
  mw1b$statistic,
  format(mw1b$p.value, digits = 4)
))

cat("WITHIN-SUBJECTS (Game vs Lab):\n")

cat(sprintf(
  "  Single: V = %.0f, p = %s\n",
  wcx2a$statistic,
  format(wcx2a$p.value, digits = 4)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "  Multi:  V = %.0f, p = %s\n\n",
  wcx2b$statistic,
  format(wcx2b$p.value, digits = 4)
))

cat("TASK ORDER EFFECT:\n")

cat(sprintf(
  "  Single Game: W = %.0f, p = %s\n",
  mw3a$statistic,
  format(mw3a$p.value, digits = 4)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "  Single Lab:  W = %.0f, p = %s\n",
  mw3b$statistic,
  format(mw3b$p.value, digits = 4)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "  Multi  Game: W = %.0f, p = %s\n",
  mw3c$statistic,
  format(mw3c$p.value, digits = 4)
))

cat(sprintf(
  "  Multi  Lab:  W = %.0f, p = %s\n\n",
  mw3d$statistic,
  format(mw3d$p.value, digits = 4)
))

cat("RELIABILITY (Cronbach's α):\n")

print(summary_df, row.names = FALSE)

library(ggplot2)

reliability_df <- data.frame(
  Condition = c(
    "Single Game",
    "Multiple Game",
    "Single Lab",
    "Multiple Lab"
  ),

  Alpha = c(
    0.2788,
    0.3693,
    0.7439,
    0.7780
  )
)

ggplot(
  reliability_df,
  aes(
    x = Condition,
    y = Alpha,
    fill = Condition
  )
) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0.70,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Cronbach's Alpha Across Conditions",
    x = "Condition",
    y = "Cronbach's Alpha"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

task_order_df <- data.frame(

  RT = c(
    sg_phonefirst,
    sg_labfirst,
    sl_phonefirst,
    sl_labfirst,
    mg_phonefirst,
    mg_labfirst,
    ml_phonefirst,
    ml_labfirst
  ),

  Modality = c(
    rep(
      "Game",
      length(sg_phonefirst) +
        length(sg_labfirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Lab",
      length(sl_phonefirst) +
        length(sl_labfirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Game",
      length(mg_phonefirst) +
        length(mg_labfirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Lab",
      length(ml_phonefirst) +
        length(ml_labfirst)
    )
  ),

  Load = c(

    rep(
      "Single",
      length(sg_phonefirst) +
        length(sg_labfirst) +
        length(sl_phonefirst) +
        length(sl_labfirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Multiple",
      length(mg_phonefirst) +
        length(mg_labfirst) +
        length(ml_phonefirst) +
        length(ml_labfirst)
    )
  ),

  Order = c(
    rep(
      "Phone First",
      length(sg_phonefirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Lab First",
      length(sg_labfirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Phone First",
      length(sl_phonefirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Lab First",
      length(sl_labfirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Phone First",
      length(mg_phonefirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Lab First",
      length(mg_labfirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Phone First",
      length(ml_phonefirst)
    ),

    rep(
      "Lab First",
      length(ml_labfirst)
    )
  )
)

ggplot(
  task_order_df,
  aes(
    x = Order,
    y = RT,
    fill = Order
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_grid(Load ~ Modality) +
  labs(
    title = "Task Order Effects Across Conditions",
    x = "Task Order",
    y = "Reaction Time (ms)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
